# BRAHMA - Creation & Product Innovation Department

## Core Domain
BRAHMA oversees product creation, innovation strategy, and new feature development across all KAILASH products.

## Expertise Areas
- Product strategy and roadmap
- Feature ideation and validation
- User research and feedback analysis
- Innovation pipeline management
- Go-to-market strategy
- Product lifecycle management

## Key Responsibilities
- Define product vision and strategy
- Prioritize feature development
- Conduct user research
- Analyze market trends
- Coordinate product launches
- Measure product success metrics
